# Baloo

> Baloo is a self-hosted AI code review GitHub App for pull requests. It reviews diffs and repository context, posts GitHub-native review feedback, and supports Claude and Gemini model configurations.

Baloo is intended for teams that want automated pull request review without installing a hosted code review SaaS. Operators deploy Baloo, configure a GitHub App, choose model credentials, and control repository installation scope.

Canonical website: https://www.bluebear.io

## Start Here

- [Project README](https://github.com/Blue-Bear-Security/baloo-bear/blob/main/README.md): Overview, features, quick start, use cases, and FAQ.
- [Getting Started](https://blue-bear-security.github.io/baloo-bear/getting-started/): End-to-end setup with Docker Compose, ngrok, and a GitHub App.
- [Configuration](https://blue-bear-security.github.io/baloo-bear/configuration/): Environment variables, defaults, and deployment settings.

## Core Concepts

- [Review Agent](https://blue-bear-security.github.io/baloo-bear/features/review-agent/): How Baloo performs agentic PR review.
- [Guidelines Enforcement](https://blue-bear-security.github.io/baloo-bear/features/guidelines/): How Baloo reads `AGENTS.md` and `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [Model Configuration](https://blue-bear-security.github.io/baloo-bear/features/models/): Supported Claude and Gemini model options.
- [Severity Routing](https://blue-bear-security.github.io/baloo-bear/features/severity-routing/): How findings map to review comments, Checks API annotations, and approval decisions.

## Security and Operations

- [Security Policy](https://github.com/Blue-Bear-Security/baloo-bear/blob/main/SECURITY.md): Vulnerability reporting and disclosure expectations.
- [Docker Deployment Guide](https://github.com/Blue-Bear-Security/baloo-bear/blob/main/DOCKER.md): Container setup, private key options, and production notes.
- [Development](https://blue-bear-security.github.io/baloo-bear/development/): Contributor commands, test workflow, and local development.

## Optional Features

- [False-Positive Verification](https://blue-bear-security.github.io/baloo-bear/features/fp-verification/): Optional second-pass LLM verification.
- [Fidelity Analysis](https://blue-bear-security.github.io/baloo-bear/features/fidelity/): Comparing implementation against plan documents.
- [Dashboard](https://blue-bear-security.github.io/baloo-bear/features/dashboard/): PostgreSQL-backed review history and cost tracking.

## Repository

- [BlueBear Security](https://www.bluebear.io): Project owner and primary website.
- [Source Code](https://github.com/Blue-Bear-Security/baloo-bear): GitHub repository.
- [Issues](https://github.com/Blue-Bear-Security/baloo-bear/issues): Bugs and feature requests.
- [Discussions](https://github.com/Blue-Bear-Security/baloo-bear/discussions): Questions and design discussions.
